summary:
## Roadmap Phase 3 — Complete ✅

### All 22 Items Across 6 Phases

**3-0 Cross-Session Infrastructure (6/6)**: CI-001 (Telemetry dashboard) → CI-002 (Contention detection) → CI-003 (Lane-owner agent) → CI-004 (Roadmap tools) → CI-005 (Lessons register) → CI-006 (Session diff tool)

**3-1 Postgres Migration (4/4)**: PG-001 (Schema definitions) → PG-002 (Migration runner) → PG-003 (Pg CI validation) → PG-004 (Connection pool + health checks)

**3-2 Decouple Bootstrap & Config (3/3)**: DC-001 (PlatformPaths interface) → DC-002 (Chrome renderer) → DC-003 (PluginTransport)

**3-3 Audit Product-Shape Hardcoding (4/4)**: HC-001 (ipc.ts decomposition) → HC-002 (Dynamic menu actions) → HC-003 (Preload bridge types) → HC-004 (Dead code sweep)

**3-4 Dialog Component Tests (2/2)**: DT-001 (Test harness) → DT-002 (42 dialog tests across 15 components)

**3-5 Localization Completion (3/3)**: L10N-001 (Locale fallback chain) → L10N-002 (Parity tests, 20/20) → L10N-003 (Stub generation script)

### Key Metrics
- 30+ lane-owner sessions across 2 waves
- ~38 Drizzle `.all()`/`.run()` calls migrated to portable equivalents
- 67 preload bridge methods preserved, 4 added (plugin transport)
- 42 dialog tests, 20 locale parity tests, 43 Postgres tests
- 8 focused modules extracted from 503-line god module
- 13 dead exports removed
- Blueprint file created for future roadmap work
- Plugin backward compatibility verified — 100%
